approvalSource: Steve approved nonstop overnight work and explicitly instructed Codex to make another sprint and keep going if the current sprint finishes before he wakes up.
constraints: close the current audit-control/intelligence sprint only after raw health, repeated failures, backlog hygiene, current sprint truth, foundation:verify, and main sync are clean
open the next safe Foundation sprint instead of stopping when the closeout is clean
park approval-bound/private/provider/browser-auth/paid/external-write actions and continue the next safe card
do not start Value Builder split
do not run live Loom, Skool, Mycro, meeting-video, paid/provider, browser-auth, broad private extraction, Drive permission mutation, credential mutation, provider config, sends, or external writes
next sprint starts from live backlog truth and avoids already-done v1 cards unless a focused regression proves a gap
